title: Schoenoxiphium schimperianum
taxonomy: Schoenoxiphium schimperianum is a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is a type of monocotyledonous flowering plant native to tropical Africa. The genus Schoenoxiphium is a small group of sedges, and this particular species is often found growing in wetland areas. Schoenoxiphium schimperianum is classified as a perennial herb, with narrow leaves and a distinctive inflorescence. This classification reflects its unique growth habits and characteristics as a member of the Cyperaceae family.
